violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

(Pastilitos) was observed held at (99-117) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily chose not to reheat product and disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The walls in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Inspector observed establishment selling pastillitos from an unapproved food source. Product disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Several beverage containers were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
